description: Nx monorepos (detected via nx.json at repo root - note this is a coincidental name collision: Nx's own project config file is genuinely called `nx.json`, same as this template file, but they live in different directories and don't otherwise relate).

plugins.description: Official Nx/Nrwl plugin (github.com/nrwl/nx-ai-agents-config) - workspace exploration, code generation, task running (affected/run-many), workspace-package linking, CI monitoring via Nx Cloud MCP. Free for core usage; Nx Cloud self-healing CI has a paid tier at scale. Setup can also be done via `npx nx configure-ai-agents`.

_notes: marketplace_add path is unverified - confirm with `npx nx configure-ai-agents` or nx.dev/blog/nx-ai-agent-skills before relying on it.
